message:
feat(tools): wire guard install/uninstall to mcp-agent-mail-guard crate

Replace stub install_precommit_guard and uninstall_precommit_guard tool handlers
with real implementations that call mcp-agent-mail-guard. Now properly resolves
core.hooksPath, installs chain-runner + plugin scripts, preserves existing hooks,
and reports correct installed/removed status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
